caption_guidance: Hook under 20 words tied to one clear product benefit. Body: exactly 3 short bullet selling points. CTA: soft question or comment prompt, not hard sell. Hashtags: 8-12 mix of brand, niche, and product tags.
visual_guidance: Instagram 4:5 (1080x1350). Hero product occupies 60-80% of frame, centered or rule-of-thirds. Clean background tied to brand palette. Lifestyle context when using Path B. No AI-generated text on image for Path A/B.
path_rules: With product asset: default Path B for lifestyle scene reference edit. Use Path C when short badges, price, or NEW labels are needed. Without asset: Path A atmosphere only. Never use Path A when a hero product asset is available.

composition.safe_zone: Keep focal product and key labels in center; avoid critical details in top/bottom 10% (UI overlap).

prompt_snippets.path_a: Clean instagram lifestyle scene showcasing the product category mood, vertical 4:5, soft natural light, minimal props, no text, no words, no typography, no logo.
prompt_snippets.path_b: Place the reference product as the hero in a realistic lifestyle scene. Product clearly visible and recognizable. Vertical instagram photo 4:5, warm natural light, clean composition, shallow depth of field, no text, no words, no typography.
prompt_snippets.path_c: Template composite: hero product cutout on brand-colored background, optional 1-2 short uppercase badges (e.g. NEW, -20%), leave negative space, mobile-readable layout.
